Join Our Team

Be part of a mission-driven team committed to providing quality healthcare to everyone in our community.

Provider Positions

Physicians, nurse practitioners, dentists, behavioral health providers, and other clinical roles.

View Provider Jobs

All Other Positions

Administrative, support, and non-clinical roles across all CMC locations.

View All Jobs

Why Work at CMC?

Community Medical Centers is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) serving the Central Valley. We offer competitive salaries, comprehensive benefits, and the satisfaction of making a real difference in our patients' lives every day.

Stay Connected — Sign up for CMC News & Updates
